headerDisplay: Send emails via iCloud SMTP when switches are triggered

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of this platform instance in Homebridge.

username.title: iCloud email address (sender)
username.description: iCloud email used for SMTP authentication and as default recipient if 'to' is not assigned on a switch.

password.title: App-specific password
password.description: Generate an app-specific password at https://account.apple.com.

to.title: Recipient email(s)
to.description: Optional. If empty, uses default iCloud email. Multiple recipients supported (comma-separated).

cooldown.title: Cooldown (seconds)
cooldown.description: Minimum time in seconds before this switch can send another email. Prevents accidental repeated triggers or automation loops.
